get.description: Retrieve the webhook settings for the specified app, including the webhook’s target URL, throttle configuration, and create/update date.

put.description: Update webhook settings for the specified app.

delete.description: Delete the webhook settings for the specified app. Event subscriptions will not be deleted, but will be paused until another webhook is created.

get.description: Retrieve event subscriptions for the specified app.

post.description: Create new event subscription for the specified app.
Batch create event subscriptions for the specified app.

get.description: Retrieve a specific event subscription by ID.

delete.description: Delete an existing event subscription by ID.

patch.description: Update an existing event subscription by ID.

maxConcurrentRequests.description: The maximum number of HTTP requests HubSpot will attempt to make to your app in a given time frame determined by `period`.

category.description: The main category of the error.

context.description: Additional context-specific information related to the error.

id.description: A unique ID for the error instance.

links.description: URLs linking to documentation or resources associated with the error.

message.description: A human-readable string describing the error and possible remediation steps.

status.description: The HTTP status code associated with the error.

subCategory.description: A more specific error category within each main category.

results.description: An array containing all active and paused event subscriptions configured for the app.

numErrors.description: The number of errors that occurred during the batch operation.

code.description: The status code associated with the error detail

in.description: The name of the field or parameter in which the error was found.

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook subscription was created, in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2020-02-29T12:30:00Z).

id.description: The unique ID of the webhook subscription.

objectTypeId.description: The ID of the object type for the subscription. This can be a standard CRM object (e.g., 'contact', 'company', 'deal') or a custom object ID for custom object subscriptions.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook subscription was last updated, in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2020-02-29T12:30:00Z).

createdAt.description: When this subscription was created. Formatted as milliseconds from the [Unix epoch](#).

targetUrl.description: A publicly available URL for Hubspot to call where event payloads will be delivered. See [link-so-some-doc](#) for details about the format of these event payloads.

updatedAt.description: When this subscription was last updated. Formatted as milliseconds from the [Unix epoch](#).

active.description: Whether to activate or pause the webhook subscription. If true, the subscription will send webhook notifications. If false, the subscription is paused and will not send notifications.

id.description: The ID of the webhook subscription to update.

active.description: Whether the subscription is active or paused. If true, the subscription will send webhook notifications. If false, the subscription is paused and will not send notifications.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook subscription was created, in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2020-02-29T12:30:00Z).

eventType.description: The type of event to listen for. Accepted values include contact.creation, contact.deletion, contact.propertyChange, and similar event types for other CRM objects and custom objects.

eventTypeName.description: The name of the event to listen for. This is used with custom objects to specify custom event types beyond the standard eventType enum values.

id.description: The unique ID of the webhook subscription.

objectTypeId.description: The ID of the object type for the subscription. This can be a standard CRM object (e.g., 'contact', 'company', 'deal') or a custom object ID for custom object subscriptions.

propertyName.description: The internal name of the property to monitor for changes. Only applies when eventType is propertyChange.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook subscription was last updated, in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2020-02-29T12:30:00Z).

active.description: Determines if the subscription is active or paused. Defaults to false.

eventType.description: Type of event to listen for. Can be one of `create`, `delete`, `deletedForPrivacy`, or `propertyChange`.

eventTypeName.description: The name of the event to listen for. This is used with custom objects to specify custom event types beyond the standard eventType enum values.

objectTypeId.description: The ID of the object type for the subscription. This can be a standard CRM object (e.g., 'contact', 'company', 'deal') or a custom object ID for custom object subscriptions.

propertyName.description: The internal name of the property to monitor for changes. Only applies when `eventType` is `propertyChange`.

completedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was completed.

links.description: A collection of related links associated with the batch operation.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was requested.

results.description: The list of results from the batch operation.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation started.

status.description: The current status of the batch operation, which can be PENDING, PROCESSING, CANCELED, or COMPLETE.

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request. Include this value with any error reports or support tickets

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs containing documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

example.message: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

targetUrl.description: A publicly available URL for Hubspot to call where event payloads will be delivered. See [link-so-some-doc](#) for details about the format of these event payloads.

active.description: Whether to activate or pause the webhook subscription. If true, the subscription will send webhook notifications. If false, the subscription is paused and will not send notifications.

Filter.description: Defines a single condition for searching CRM objects, specifying the property to filter on, the operator to use (such as equals, greater than, or contains), and the value(s) to compare against.
